parameters.query: SELECT s.id as system_id, s.system_name, s.display_name, s.status, cc.id as config_id, cc.collector_type, cc.metric_group, cc.prometheus_job FROM system_collector_config cc JOIN systems s ON cc.system_id = s.id WHERE s.status = 'active' AND cc.enabled = true ORDER BY s.system_name, cc.collector_type, cc.metric_group

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ system_id: $json.system_id, hour_bucket: $json.hour_bucket_iso, collector_type: $json.collector_type, metric_group: $json.metric_group, metrics_json: $json.metrics_json, llm_severity: 'normal' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_code: $env.LLM_AGENT_CODE, api_key: $env.LLM_API_KEY, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.llm_prompt }], max_tokens: 400 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ system_id: $json.system_id, system_name: $json.system_name, hour_bucket: $json.hour_bucket_iso, collector_type: $json.collector_type, metric_group: $json.metric_group, summary_text: $json.summary_text, llm_severity: $json.llm_severity, llm_trend: $json.llm_trend, llm_prediction: $json.llm_prediction, pg_row_id: $json.pg_row_id }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ system_id: $('LLM 응답 파싱').first().json.system_id, hour_bucket: $('LLM 응답 파싱').first().json.hour_bucket_iso, collector_type: $('LLM 응답 파싱').first().json.collector_type, metric_group: $('LLM 응답 파싱').first().json.metric_group, metrics_json: $('LLM 응답 파싱').first().json.metrics_json, llm_summary: $('LLM 응답 파싱').first().json.llm_summary, llm_severity: $('LLM 응답 파싱').first().json.llm_severity, llm_trend: $('LLM 응답 파싱').first().json.llm_trend, llm_prediction: $('LLM 응답 파싱').first().json.llm_prediction, llm_model_used: $('LLM 응답 파싱').first().json.llm_model_used, qdrant_point_id: $input.first().json.point_id }) }}
